title: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings

title: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
summary: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
briefing: The partnership extends distribution of Nasdaq's TotalView market data to blockchain applications and other software platforms through Pyth's marketplace.

title: Bitcoin price risks drop below $58K as US dollar hits 40-year high against yen
summary: Bitcoin price risks drop below $58K as US dollar hits 40-year high against yen
briefing: Bitcoin faced downside pressure as the US dollar hit its highest levels against the Japanese yen since 1986, while BTC price analysis revealed "capitulation" by 2025 top-buyers.

title: AI’s power crunch turns Bitcoin miners’ grid access into an asset
summary: AI’s power crunch turns Bitcoin miners’ grid access into an asset
briefing: Bitcoin miners have the power sites AI companies need, but turning old mining campuses into real data center revenue is no easy pivot.

title: Crypto companies have spent $189M so far on 2026 US election cycle: Report
summary: Crypto companies have spent $189M so far on 2026 US election cycle: Report

title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending

briefing: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and sanctioned jurisdictions.

summary: Sharplink Buys Ethereum for First Time in 2026—With ETH Down 68% From Peak
briefing: Ethereum treasury firm Sharplink purchased around $16 million worth of ETH last week, marking its first crypto buy since last year.

briefing: Michael Saylor's Strategy is rolling out some major changes to how it handles Bitcoin going forward. And so far, the market likes it.

title: '47 Ronin' Director Gets 30 Months for Spending Netflix's $11M on Dogecoin

briefing: Carl Rinsch gambled Netflix's $11 million on stock options and Dogecoin, then spent the winnings on luxury cars and watches.
